name: npm install
description: Install Node.js packages from the npm registry or from a package.json file

options.label: Save as dev dependency
options.description: Install and save the package as a development dependency in package.json

options.label: Global
options.description: Install the package globally, making it available system-wide

options.label: Save exact version
options.description: Save the exact version number rather than using a semver range

options.label: Legacy peer deps
options.description: Ignore peer dependency conflicts, using legacy npm behavior

positionalArgs.label: Packages
positionalArgs.description: Package names to install (omit to install from package.json)

examples.label: Install a package as a dev dependency
Install an exact version of a package
Install with legacy peer dependency resolution
Install multiple dev tools at exact versions
